name: Grievance Officer
text: In accordance with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 ('DPDP Act') and the Information Technology (Intermediary Guidelines and Digital Media Ethics Code) Rules, 2021, the Data Fiduciary has designated a Grievance Officer to address complaints and queries regarding the processing of personal data. The name and contact details of the Grievance Officer are as follows: Name: [GRIEVANCE_OFFICER_NAME]; Designation: [GRIEVANCE_OFFICER_DESIGNATION]; Email: [GRIEVANCE_OFFICER_EMAIL]; Address: [GRIEVANCE_OFFICER_ADDRESS]. Any data principal may submit a grievance or complaint to the Grievance Officer within a reasonable time. The Grievance Officer shall acknowledge receipt of the grievance within 48 (forty-eight) hours and resolve the same within 30 (thirty) days of receipt, in accordance with Rule 4 of the IT Rules, 2021 and applicable provisions of the DPDP Act, 2023.

legal_basis.act: Information Technology (Intermediary Guidelines and Digital Media Ethics Code) Rules, 2021

invalid_if: Contact details for the Grievance Officer are missing or incomplete
